name: golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev
title: golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev
summary: set of numeric libraries for the Go programming language
description:
set of numeric libraries for the Go programming language
This package contains libraries for matrices and linear algebra; statistics,
probability distributions, and sampling; tools for function differentiation,
integration, and optimization; network creation and analysis; and more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev because set of numeric libraries for the Go programming language.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gonum-v1-gonum-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
